languages.text: "Расстраиваться здесь следует Себериану. Если бы мой сенешаль допустил такое, я был{mf||а} бы крайне разочарован{mf||а}".

traits.locale_text: "Расстраиваться здесь следует Себериану. Если бы мой сенешаль допустил такое, я был{mf||а} бы крайне разочарован{mf||а}".

languages.text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."
languages.original_text: "Расстраиваться здесь следует Себериану. Если бы мой сенешаль допустил такое, я был{mf||а} бы крайне разочарован{mf||а}".

traits.locale_text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."
"Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."
"Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."

languages.text: “该生气的是塞贝里安。要是我的总领让我落到这地步，我早就失望透顶了。”
languages.original_text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."

traits.locale_text: “该生气的是塞贝里安。要是我的总领让我落到这地步，我早就失望透顶了。”

languages.text: « Mettez-vous plutôt à la place de Seberian, au lieu de pleurnicher. Si mon sénéchal permettait qu'il m'arrive une chose pareille, je serais extrêmement {mf|déçu|déçue}. »
languages.original_text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."

traits.locale_text: « Mettez-vous plutôt à la place de Seberian, au lieu de pleurnicher. Si mon sénéchal permettait qu'il m'arrive une chose pareille, je serais extrêmement {mf|déçu|déçue}. »

languages.text: "Kızması gereken asıl kişi Seberian. Benim Seneşalim bana böyle bir şey yapılmasına göz yumsaydı hayal kırıklığımın derinliğini anlatacak kelime bulamazdım."
languages.original_text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."

traits.locale_text: "Kızması gereken asıl kişi Seberian. Benim Seneşalim bana böyle bir şey yapılmasına göz yumsaydı hayal kırıklığımın derinliğini anlatacak kelime bulamazdım."

languages.text: «Seberian es el que debería enfadarse. Si mi Senescal permitiera que me ocurriera algo así, estaría profundamente decepcionad{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."

traits.locale_text: «Seberian es el que debería enfadarse. Si mi Senescal permitiera que me ocurriera algo así, estaría profundamente decepcionad{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: "Seberian ist es, der verärgert sein sollte. Würde mein Truchsess zulassen, dass mir so etwas passiert, wäre ich zutiefst enttäuscht."
languages.original_text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian ist es, der verärgert sein sollte. Würde mein Truchsess zulassen, dass mir so etwas passiert, wäre ich zutiefst enttäuscht."

languages.text: 「シベリアは怒るべきだ。もし私の執事がこの私に起こったことを許していたなら、私は深く失望していただろう。」
languages.original_text: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアは怒るべきだ。もし私の執事がこの私に起こったことを許していたなら、私は深く失望していただろう。」
